moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Weekend Approaching
moments.blurb: The penultimate day of The Championships, Wimbledon, is underway, with the Men's and Women's Singles Finals set for the weekend.

angles.name: Centre Court Drama
angles.copy: Who will lift the trophies this weekend? The drama at Wimbledon is building towards the Men's and Women's Singles Finals! Who are you backing?

angles.name: British Hopes
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream are ready! Wimbledon is heading for its climax, with British hopes still alive in the doubles and juniors. Catch all the action before Sunday's final serves!

moments.title: Tour de France Continues
moments.blurb: The 113th edition of the Tour de France is currently in its fifth stage, with riders tackling the Pyrenees mountains today.

angles.name: Mountain Stage
angles.copy: The Tour de France is deep in the Pyrenees today for Stage 5 from Lannemezan to Pau. Expect some epic climbs and breathtaking views!

angles.name: Who's in Yellow?
angles.copy: Who's wearing yellow today? The Tour de France is well underway, with the peloton battling through some brutal stages. Keep up with all the action on the road to Paris!

moments.title: The Open Championship Tees Off
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship, one of golf's major tournaments, begins this Sunday at Royal Birkdale in Southport, England.

angles.name: Major Golf Action
angles.copy: Get ready for links golf! The Open Championship begins this Sunday at Royal Birkdale. Who are your picks for the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Royal Birkdale
angles.copy: The world's best golfers descend on Royal Birkdale for The Open Championship this weekend. Expect unpredictable weather and incredible shots!

moments.title: 2000trees Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The 2000trees Festival, a celebration of rock and indie music, is underway from July 8-11 in Gloucestershire.

angles.name: Live Rock This Week
angles.copy: Day one of 2000trees Festival! Who's heading to Gloucestershire for three days of incredible rock and indie music?

angles.name: Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Good morning, 2000trees! The festival is officially ON. What's your must-see band on the lineup this year?

moments.title: Kaleidoscope Festival at Ally Pally
moments.blurb: North London's Kaleidoscope Festival returns to Alexandra Palace Park this Saturday, July 11, with a lineup of music, comedy, and arts.

angles.name: London Festival Ready
angles.copy: This Saturday, Kaleidoscope Festival takes over Alexandra Palace! Who are you excited to see at this unique London event?

angles.name: Music & Comedy
angles.copy: Music, comedy, and stunning views of London – Kaleidoscope Festival is almost here! Grab your tickets for Saturday, July 11th.

moments.title: Hebridean Celtic Festival Approaches
moments.blurb: The Hebridean Celtic Festival, celebrating traditional and contemporary Celtic music, runs from July 15-18 in Stornoway, Outer Hebrides, Scotland.

angles.name: Celtic Music Magic
angles.copy: Heading to the Outer Hebrides next week? The Hebridean Celtic Festival kicks off on July 15th! Get ready for incredible music and island vibes.

angles.name: Scottish Festival
angles.copy: Experience the unique atmosphere of the Hebridean Celtic Festival next week! A blend of traditional and modern music against a stunning backdrop.

moments.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean Hold UK No.1
moments.blurb: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' remains at Number 1 on the Official Singles Chart (July 2-8), making chart history with 15 non-consecutive weeks at the top.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: Still at Number 1! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' continues its incredible run on the Official Singles Chart. Have you streamed it today?

angles.name: Making History
angles.copy: 'Rein Me In' just made history with 15 non-consecutive weeks at the top! Huge congrats to Sam Fender & Olivia Dean.

moments.title: Madonna's 'Danceteria' Eyes Chart Entry
moments.blurb: Madonna's new track 'Danceteria' from her album 'CONFESSIONS II' is tipped for this week's highest new entry on the Official Singles Chart.

angles.name: Queen of Pop Returns
angles.copy: New Madonna alert! 'Danceteria' is looking like this week's highest new entry on the Official Singles Chart. Are you loving her latest?

angles.name: Chart Watch
angles.copy: Can Madonna grab a new Top 40 hit with 'Danceteria'? We'll find out when the new chart drops!

moments.title: 'The Dark' Thriller on ITV
moments.blurb: ITV's new 'hide behind the sofa' crime thriller 'The Dark', starring Laura Donnelly, premieres this Sunday, July 12, set in the Scottish Highlands.

angles.name: New ITV Thriller
angles.copy: Get ready for some chills! New crime thriller 'The Dark' starts this Sunday on ITV. Who's tuning in for the Scottish Highlands mystery?

angles.name: Weekend Watch
angles.copy: Sunday night sorted with ITV's new drama 'The Dark'. Prepare for a gripping watch!

moments.title: 'The Five Star Weekend' on Sky
moments.blurb: Sky's new star-studded relationship drama 'The Five Star Weekend', featuring Jennifer Garner, Gemma Chan, and Chloë Sevigny, premieres tomorrow, July 9.

angles.name: Star-Studded Drama
angles.copy: Jennifer Garner, Gemma Chan, Chloë Sevigny! 'The Five Star Weekend' arrives on Sky tomorrow. Who's excited for this new relationship drama?

angles.name: New Series Alert
angles.copy: Tomorrow! 'The Five Star Weekend' brings an escape to your screen on Sky and NOW. Perfect for some mid-week viewing!

moments.title: Happy 56th to Beck
moments.blurb: Today, July 8, marks the 56th birthday of Grammy-winning singer-songwriter and producer Beck.

angles.name: Celebrating Beck
angles.copy: Happy 56th Birthday to the one and only Beck! What's your favourite track from the genre-bending artist?

angles.name: Modern Rock Icon
angles.copy: From 'Loser' to 'Dreams', Beck has given us so many unforgettable songs. Wishing a very happy 56th birthday to the legend!

moments.title: Jaden Smith Turns 28
moments.blurb: Actor and rapper Jaden Smith celebrates his 28th birthday today, July 8.

angles.name: Birthday Shout-out
angles.copy: Happy 28th Birthday to Jaden Smith! From acting to music, he's always pushing boundaries. What's your favourite Jaden track?

angles.name: Celebrating Jaden
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 28th birthday to Jaden Smith today! What's your favourite of his movies or songs?

moments.title: Roger McGuinn's 84th Birthday
moments.blurb: Roger McGuinn, influential singer-songwriter and co-founder of The Byrds, celebrates his 84th birthday on July 13.

angles.name: Folk Rock Legend
angles.copy: Next Monday, a true pioneer turns 84! Happy early birthday to Roger McGuinn of The Byrds. What's your go-to Byrds track?

angles.name: The Byrds Icon
angles.copy: From jingle-jangle guitars to timeless folk-rock, Roger McGuinn's influence is immense. Celebrate his 84th birthday on July 13th!

moments.title: Stewart Copeland Turns 74
moments.blurb: Stewart Copeland, the acclaimed drummer and co-founder of The Police, will celebrate his 74th birthday on July 16.

angles.name: Drumming Legend
angles.copy: Next Thursday, we're celebrating the incredible Stewart Copeland, drummer for The Police, who turns 74! What's your favourite Police song?

angles.name: The Police Drummer
angles.copy: Happy early 74th birthday to the rhythmic force behind The Police, Stewart Copeland! His drumming is still iconic.

moments.title: England & Wales Summer Holidays Begin
moments.blurb: Most schools in England and Wales will begin their summer holidays between July 18 and July 25, marking the start of the main break for many families.

angles.name: School's Out Soon
angles.copy: Counting down the days? Many schools in England & Wales will break up for summer from July 18th! What are your summer plans?

angles.name: Freedom!
angles.copy: The long-awaited summer holidays are almost here for pupils across England and Wales! Time for adventures and relaxation.
